summary: Iteration 39 - Complete testing of Post Analisi Partnership page (11-section conversion funnel). Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All 11 sections verified. Fixed contract article parsing regex bug.

issues: Chat button click blocked by Emergent badge overlay at bottom-right corner - minor z-index issue

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Contract article parsing regex - changed from /Art\.\s*\d+/ to /(?:Art\.\s*\d+|ARTICOLO\s+\d+)/ to match actual contract text format
Section 1 (Recap): Shows greeting with client name and quiz data - VERIFIED
Section 2 (Analisi): PDF download button and audio button present - VERIFIED
Section 3 (Transition): 'La situazione è questa' static text - VERIFIED
Section 4 (Partnership): 4 partnership steps with icons - VERIFIED
Section 5 (Process): 6 operational phases in grid - VERIFIED
Section 6 (Value): 8 concrete value items with checkmarks - VERIFIED
Section 7 (Bonus): 4 bonus cards with values - VERIFIED
Section 8 (Decision): Side-by-side comparison of 2 scenarios - VERIFIED
Section 9 (Contract): 18 accordion articles parsed from contract text, important articles (3,5,7,9,11) have shield icon - VERIFIED
Section 10 (Signature): Input field + sign button, disabled until all important articles confirmed - VERIFIED
Section 11 (Payment): Shows only after signing - VERIFIED (not visible until signed)
Contract chat widget: Floating chat button opens chat panel - VERIFIED (minor overlay issue)
Backend endpoints all working: contract-text, partnership-firma, partnership-checkout, partnership-bonifico
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user mario.rossi@test.com and Test QuizUser
context_for_next_testing_agent: Post Analisi Partnership page is fully implemented with 11 sections. Contract text uses 'ARTICOLO X' format (not 'Art. X'). When testing in Admin Preview mode without selecting a specific client, the demo user ID is used which returns 404 from API - this is expected behavior. To test with real data, select a client from the Pipeline first, then click Vista Cliente.
